title: The Bandit
writer: Alberto Lattuada, Oreste Biancoli, Mino Caudana
actors: Anna Magnani, Amedeo Nazzari, Carla Del Poggio
plot: A contingent of Italian prisoners of war arrive on a train from Germany after World War II to Turin. The city where Ernesto lives has been bombed, his mother is dead and his sister has gone missing.
